"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"\",\"new\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True\",\"old\":\"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=max(1, total_steps))\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use a step-budget-aware cosine schedule and a slightly stronger AdamW setup to improve optimization under the fixed checker budget without changing the model contract.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\"]}"}}
